2606.13578.title: LabVLA: Grounding Vision-Language-Action Models in Scientific Laboratories
2606.13578.paper_summary: Scientific laboratories increasingly rely on AI systems to reason about experiments, but the physical act of doing science remains largely outside their reach. AI can help read literature, generate hypotheses, and plan protocols, yet the execution of those protocols at the bench still requires a human operator. Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide one possible interface between written protocols and robot execution, but existing policies are trained mostly on household and tabletop demonstrations and rarely encounter the instruments, transparent liquids, or fixed protocol workflows found in scientific laboratories. Closing this gap requires both laboratory-specific supervision and a unified learning framework that can accommodate the diverse robot embodiments used to execute experimental protocols. We therefore identify data and embodiment as central bottlenecks alongside model design. To address the data side, we build RoboGenesis, a simulation-based workflow and data engine that composes configured laboratory workflows from atomic skills, validates and filters rollouts, and exports structured demonstrations across supported robot profiles. On the policy side, we present LabVLA, trained with a two-stage recipe: FAST action token pretraining first makes the Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct backbone action aware before any continuous control is learned, and flow matching posttraining then attaches a DiT action expert under knowledge insulation. On the LabUtopia benchmark, LabVLA achieves the highest average success rate among all evaluated baselines under both in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings.
2606.13578.paper_summary_zh: 科學實驗室越來越依賴人工智慧系統來推理實驗，但實際進行科學的行為仍然在它們的能力範圍之外。人工智慧可以幫助閱讀文獻、生成假設和規劃流程，但在實驗台上執行這些流程仍然需要人類操作員。視覺-語言-行動（VLA）模型提供了一種可能的介面，將書面流程與機器人執行連接起來，但現有的政策主要是在家庭和桌面演示上進行訓練，並且很少接觸到科學實驗室中出現的儀器、透明液體或固定的流程工作流。填補這一空白需要實驗室特定的監督以及一個統一的學習框架，能夠容納用於執行實驗流程的多樣化機器人實體。因此，我們將數據和實體識別為模型設計之外的核心瓶頸。為了解決數據問題，我們構建了RoboGenesis，一個基於模擬的工作流程和數據引擎，該引擎從原子技能組合配置的實驗室工作流程，驗證和過濾推出，並在支持的機器人配置上導出結構化演示。在政策方面，我們提出了LabVLA，這是一個經過兩階段配方訓練的模型：FAST行動令牌的預訓練首先使Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct骨幹具備行動意識，然後在學習任何連續控制之前，流匹配後訓練再將一個DiT行動專家附加在知識隔離之下。在LabUtopia基準測試中，LabVLA在所有評估基準中達到了最高的平均成功率，無論是在分佈內還是分佈外的設置下。
2606.13578.author: Baochang Ren et.al.
2606.13578.authors: Baochang Ren, Xinjie Liu, Xi Chen, Yanshuo Liu, Chenxi Li, Daqi Gao, Zeqin Su, Jintao Xing, Zirui Xue, Rui Li, Xiangyu Zhao, Shuofei Qiao, Minting Pan, Wangmeng Zuo, Lei Bai, Dongzhan Zhou, Ningyu Zhang, Huajun Chen
